stage: Этап 2. Классическая денежно-кредитная политика в полной HANK
solution_method: steady state + sequence-space Jacobian + nonlinear transition
household_block: two assets, idiosyncratic labor income, rebalancing costs
policy_rule: i_t = rho_i i_{t-1} + (1-rho_i)(rstar + phi_pi pi_t + phi_y y_gap_t) + eps_t^i
